_meta.author: abdulali254
_meta.title: Aurora Button
_meta.description: The AuroraButton is a customizable React component that creates a button with a beautiful, animated gradient border effect. When you hover over the button, the border glows with an aurora-like effect, using a blend of purple, cyan, and emerald colors. The button itself has a dark glass-like appearance with a transparent background, making it suitable for modern, elegant user interfaces.
